name: Armor Stat Multiplier
author: ZmallBang
description:
This mod increases the effectiveness of armor by multiplying positive stat bonuses.
Choose between 2x, 5x, 10x, or 25x versions to fit your playstyle.
Negative stats and slot-related values
summary:
This mod increases the effectiveness of armor by multiplying positive stat bonuses.
Choose between 2x, 5x, 10x, or 25x versions to fit your playstyle.
Negative stats and slot-related values are left unchanged to avoid extreme downsides or balance issues.
Ideal for players who want stronger armor without introducing harsh penalties.

summary: Creative Mode – Builder & Tester (All-in-One) is a sandbox mod for ICARUS that removes most grind and restrictions. It combines multiple extreme mods into one standalone package for creative building, testing, and relaxed gameplay. Designed for builders, testers, and sandbox players.

summary: Slows down experience gain for a more gradual and long-term progression experience. Ideal for players who want extended gameplay, meaningful leveling, and a slower-paced solo or co-op run. Includes multiple percentage-based versions so you can choose your preferred progression speed.

name: Ferani's Compatible Ammo

summary: Any ammunition is compatible with any firearm. Arrows and bolts can be used by both bows and crossbows. Any ammunition can be used for turrets.

summary: Lights and candles don't need power or fuel.

summary: All animals have the grazing ability, so they can find their own food. Part of the Obedience Training Collection.

author: Feranishades
description: Tamed pets and mounts cause no damage to your buildings and deployables. Part of the Obedience Training Collection.
summary: Tamed pets and mounts cause no damage to your buildings and deployables. Part of the Obedience Training Collection.

author: Ferani
description: The Animal Heated Bed now actually is warm. It now requires two electronics to craft, but it now gives off +10 degrees celsius of warmth, 25% stamina regeneration, and 25% health regeneration.
summary: The Animal Heated Bed now actually is warm. It now requires two electronics to craft, but it now gives off +10 degrees celsius of warmth, 25% stamina regeneration, and 25% health regeneration.

summary: Your tames and mounts can eat human food and gain buffs, and have 2 extra stomach spaces. Part of the Obedience Training-collection.

name: Ferani's Lava-Proof Paws
author: Feranishades
description: Tamed animals and mounts are fully immune to lava and will not catch fire if they touch it. Part of the Obedience Training Collection.
summary: Tamed animals and mounts are fully immune to lava and will not catch fire if they touch it. Part of the Obedience Training Collection.

summary: You can build in lava without your materials burning up. Great for building bridges in volcanic areas.

summary: Mount icons on the compass have no max distance. It might make your compass a little crowded... But at least you can find your pets!

summary: Mounts and tames do not take damage from defensive structures, like spikes and hedgehogs. Part of the Obedience Training-collection.

name: Ferani's Sneaky Paws
author: Feranishades
description: Mounts and tames have significantly less threat, so they won't be spotted as easily. Juveniles do not get attacked at all. Part of the Obedience Training-collection.
summary: Mounts and tames have significantly less threat, so they won't be spotted as easily. Juveniles do not get attacked at all. Part of the Obedience Training-collection.

With this tool, you can create a config.json file with instructions of what you want to modify in Icarus data.pak
You can modify what config you want in any json files inside data.pak and don't n
summary:
With this tool, you can create a config.json file with instructions of what you want to modify in Icarus data.pak
You can modify what config you want in any json files inside data.pak and don't need to download mods again

name: Infinite Stamina
author: Xaimav
description: Set infinite stamina for the character and all mounts.
summary: Set infinite stamina for the character and all mounts.

name: Infinite Stamina - Half Needs
author: Xaimav
description: Set infinite stamina for the character and all mounts and slow down the character's bodily needs by half.
summary: Set infinite stamina for the character and all mounts and slow down the character's bodily needs by half.

name: Infinite Stamina - Half Needs - Mount Speed Boost
author: Xaimav
description: Set infinite stamina for the character and all mounts along with a small mount speed boost and slow down the character's bodily needs by half.
summary: Set infinite stamina for the character and all mounts along with a small mount speed boost and slow down the character's bodily needs by half.

name: Instant Mining And Logging
author: ZmallBang
description: This mod enables one-hit resource gathering for trees and mining nodes once the appropriate talent is unlocked.
summary: This mod enables one-hit resource gathering for trees and mining nodes once the appropriate talent is unlocked.

author: Begginfokillz
description: "Unpack to collect a carefully hand picked assortment of high quality wares from Larkwell Martinez to assist you in your first few days planetside. Nothing in this package can be brought back into orb
summary: "Unpack to collect a carefully hand picked assortment of high quality wares from Larkwell Martinez to assist you in your first few days planetside. Nothing in this package can be brought back into orbit. A fairly priced product from Larkwell Martinez and fan favorite of the First Cohort. No Refunds."

name: Level Cap 250 - Extended Progression
author: xynv4
description: Extends the player level cap from 60 to 250 while keeping progression simple and balanced.
summary: Extends the player level cap from 60 to 250 while keeping progression simple and balanced.

name: Max Fishing
author: Luscious LewLew
description: This mod adds every single fish and fish variant to all pools of water on all maps including outposts, however you still need the correct lures to fish for them.
summary: This mod adds every single fish and fish variant to all pools of water on all maps including outposts, however you still need the correct lures to fish for them.

name: Maximum Building Durability
author: e45
description: Increases building durability to the maximum hitpoints for all materials. Buildings become virtually indestructible while maintaining damage mechanics. Extremely rare for structures to break even duri
summary: Increases building durability to the maximum hitpoints for all materials. Buildings become virtually indestructible while maintaining damage mechanics. Extremely rare for structures to break even during the worst storms. Perfect for players who want enhanced durability without removing all challenge.

name: Maximum Fillable Capacity and Energy Storage x10
author: nik4kin
description: Increased maximum storage volume for fillable items by x10. Increased maximum energy storage for electrical items by x10.
summary: Increased maximum storage volume for fillable items by x10. Increased maximum energy storage for electrical items by x10.

name: Minimal Building Damage
author: e45
description: Eliminates or minimizes all building damage. Structures become virtually invulnerable to storms, wildlife, collisions, and other damage sources. Build without worry - no repairs needed. Perfect for pl
summary: Eliminates or minimizes all building damage. Structures become virtually invulnerable to storms, wildlife, collisions, and other damage sources. Build without worry - no repairs needed. Perfect for players focused on exploration and survival without base maintenance. Compatible with all building materials from thatch to steel.

name: Mining Drill Speed Multiplier
author: ZmallBang
description:
Reduces mining drill extraction time by scaling each drill’s existing mining duration.
This makes drills extract resources faster while preserving progression between drill tiers.
summary:
Reduces mining drill extraction time by scaling each drill’s existing mining duration.
This makes drills extract resources faster while preserving progression between drill tiers.

name: Mission Rewards Multiplier
author: ZmallBang
description: Multiplies mission rewards, including credits, account experience, and faction experience, reducing the need to repeat missions while preserving normal gameplay flow.
summary: Multiplies mission rewards, including credits, account experience, and faction experience, reducing the need to repeat missions while preserving normal gameplay flow.

name: Mission Rewards x10
author: nik4kin
description: Mission rewards x10 (Licence x5) + SMPL3 rewards UP. Optional files for x20 (x10) and x2 (x1) w/o SMPL3 change.
summary: Mission rewards x10 (Licence x5) + SMPL3 rewards UP. Optional files for x20 (x10) and x2 (x1) w/o SMPL3 change.

summary:

summary: This mod puts all fish, creatures, and weather storms from STYX and PROMETHEUS onto OLYMPUS, adds several new variants of existing creatures for increased difficulty and resources, increases the visible level cap to 1000, transforms the Riverlands biome into the Swamp biome.
